zh.Mashbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利
zh.Of, Mashbury, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Darcy於大約1434年出生在英國英格蘭艾可馬申波利時，她的父親Robert Darcy44歲，母親Lady Alice Fitzlangley41歲。她於大約1455年與John Eugene Everard結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1468年之前在英國英格蘭艾可。

zh-hans.Mashbury, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可馬申波利
zh-hans.Of, Mashbury, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可馬申波利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Darcy于大约1434年出生在英国英格兰艾可馬申波利时，她的父亲Robert Darcy44岁，母亲Lady Alice Fitzlangley41岁。她于大约1455年与John Eugene Everard结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1468年之前在英国英格兰艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Darcy was born about 1434, in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Darcy, was 44 and her mother, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, was 41. She married John Eugene Everard about 1455. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 1468, in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Darcy est née environ 1434, à Mashbury, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Darcy, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé John Eugene Everard environ 1455. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 1468, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Darcy um 1434 in Mashbury, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Darcy 44 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice Fitzlangley 41. Sie hat um 1455 John Eugene Everard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 1468 in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Darcy è nata il circa 1434 nel Mashbury, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Darcy, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato John Eugene Everard circa 1455. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 1468, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Darcyが約1434年にイギリスイギリスエセックスマシュブリーで生まれた時，父Robert Darcyは44歳，母Lady Alice Fitzlangleyは41歳であった。約1455年にJohn Eugene Everardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1468年以前にイギリスイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Darcy(이)가 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 마스h버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Darcy(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Fitzlangley(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1455년 John Eugene Everard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1468년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Darcy nasceu aproximadamente 1434, em Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Darcy, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com John Eugene Everard aproximadamente 1455. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 1468, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Darcy родилась около 1434 г. в местности машбури, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Darcy было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Fitzlangley, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Eugene Everard около 1455 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 1468 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Darcy nació aproximadamente 1434, en Mashbury, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Darcy, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Fitzlangley, tenía 41 años. Se casó con John Eugene Everard aproximadamente 1455. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 1468, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
